# komodo_tag (Resource)

Manages a Komodo tag.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "komodo_tag" "example" {
  name  = "production"
  color = "#FF0000"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The tag name.

### Optional

- `color` (String) The tag color.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The Terraform resource ID (ObjectId).
- `owner` (String) The owner id (auto-generated by Komodo API).

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import komodo_tag.example 6627c3e4f1a2b3c4d5e6f7a8
```
